title: Management and managers
summary: 9609 AS — roles, functions, and styles of management.

simpleExplanation.title: Coordinating people and resources
simpleExplanation.summary: Managers plan, organise, command, and control resources to achieve business objectives through others.

sections.content: **Management and managers** (2.3.1) bridges **2.2 motivation** and **7.3 leadership**. Use **Fayol or Mintzberg** where relevant.
